_meta.audit: Every `body` uses a 'commonly reported' framing marker and avoids clinical-outcome vocabulary and physiological guarantees. Milestones describe what people commonly report noticing, never a clinical promise. Boundary-inclusive: a milestone at afterHours=24 unlocks the instant the streak reaches 24h (StreakEngine ratified semantics).
_meta.framing_token: Bodies are experiential and category-neutral in tone; the app renders money-saved and the user's own motivations alongside these, so copy here stays about the felt experience.

milestones.title: First stretch done
milestones.body: The first few hours are the steepest. You're through them. Commonly reported around now: cravings arrive in waves and each one passes.

milestones.title: One full day
milestones.body: A whole day. Commonly reported by the one-day mark: taste and smell start feeling a little sharper.

milestones.title: Three days
milestones.body: Three days in. This is commonly reported as the toughest window — and you're standing in it, not around it.

milestones.title: One week
milestones.body: A week. Commonly reported by now: steadier energy through the afternoon and fewer automatic reaches for it.

milestones.title: Two weeks
milestones.body: Two weeks. Commonly reported around here: the habit loops that used to feel automatic are getting quieter.

milestones.title: One month
milestones.body: A month. Commonly reported by the one-month mark: easier breathing during everyday effort and better sleep.

milestones.title: Three months
milestones.body: Three months. Commonly reported by now: cravings are occasional rather than daily, and easier to let pass.

milestones.title: One year
milestones.body: A full year. Commonly reported at a year: the pull is rare, and this feels like who you are now, not something you're fighting.

milestones.title: One day
milestones.body: One day. Commonly reported early on: sleep can be uneven at first — that's a common experience and it usually settles.

milestones.title: Three days
milestones.body: Three days. Commonly reported around now: mornings start feeling clearer.

milestones.title: One week
milestones.body: A week. Commonly reported by now: deeper sleep and more steady mornings.

milestones.title: Two weeks
milestones.body: Two weeks. Commonly reported around here: more even energy and mood across the day.

milestones.title: One month
milestones.body: A month. Commonly reported by the one-month mark: better sleep, clearer focus, and money kept that used to go elsewhere.

milestones.title: Three months
milestones.body: Three months. Commonly reported by now: social situations feel more manageable without it.

milestones.title: One year
milestones.body: A year. Commonly reported at a year: this is simply how you live now.
